projects.statusSummary:
# Lead Scraper — Status

## Overview
Lead-gen engine for BuiltSimple. Finds local businesses without websites (or with bad ones), enriches contact info, and automates personalized outreach via email and text.

## Current State (Mar 7, 2026)
- **6,875 leads** in SQLite DB across 50-mile KC metro radius
- **1,294 without websites** (prime targets)
- **187 with verified email addresses**
- **130 Gmail drafts ready** to send (filtered for sites that actually need help)
- **1,037 phone-only businesse

projects.statusSummary:
# For Abby (Abby Wonderland) — Status

## Last Updated
2026-03-04

## Current State
- Live at `https://abbywonderland.vercel.app`
- Single file: `index.html` (~5,916 lines, all HTML/CSS/JS inline)
- PWA: installable on iOS and Android via manifest.json + service worker
- No git remote hosting (local git only)

## What It Is
A personalized interactive experience built for Abby. Features a dreamy night-sky/aurora aesthetic with snowfall effects, ambient sound, and multiple interactive activities.

projects.title: Forgemaster / Roblox MCP
projects.notes: Roblox Studio integration.
projects.statusSummary:
# Forgemaster — Status

## What It Is
Roblox game factory engine. Builds complete, playable games in Roblox Studio via the MCP bridge plugin, or generates .rbxlx files offline.

## Quick Start
```bash
cd ~/projects/forgemaster

# Check Studio connection
node forge.js status

# Build a tycoon in Studio
node forge.js build tycoon --theme medieval --name "Dragon Castle Tycoon"

# Build an obby
node forge.js build obby --theme candy --name "Sugar Rush Obby"

# Build a simulator
node forge.js build s

# Vinnie's Treasure Tracker

## Overview
Research hub for brother Vinnie to find the Forrest Fenn Box from "There's Treasure Inside" by Jon Collins-Black.

## Stack
- Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind
- Supabase (planned for persistent data, notes, auto-updates)
- Mapbox (planned for interactive map)

- [x] Data layer: poem (24 lines), clues (16), research (15 entries), boxes (5)
- [x] Dashboard page
- [x] Poem Analyzer page (interactive li

ideas.name: Sophia's Resident Evil Fan Page
ideas.description: RE-themed fan page / site for friend Sophia. Details TBD.

ideas.name: Menubar LessonDraft MRR display
ideas.description: live monthly recurring revenue in the menu bar. (Wait until there are actual subscribers.)

ideas.name: Future-self email system
ideas.description: write emails to yourself that deliver on a specific date. Cron + Gmail MCP. Free, no hardware.

ideas.name: Price watcher
ideas.description: monitor product URLs, alert when price drops. Script + cron. Free.

ideas.name: Teach-me-back study tool
ideas.description: Feynman technique quizzer that makes you explain concepts back and evaluates understanding. Claude API. Basically free.

ideas.name: Link dump with brains
ideas.description: throw URLs at it, it reads/summarizes/tags them. Search later by concept, not bookmark title. Free.

ideas.name: Dead man's switch for projects
ideas.description: nudges you if you haven't committed to a project in X days. Cron + git + email. Free.

ideas.name: Context switcher
ideas.description: `ctx lessondraft` / `ctx school` opens everything for that project in one command. Free.

ideas.name: Smart file router
ideas.description: background daemon that auto-sorts Downloads by type/project. Free.

ideas.name: Pi dashboard display
ideas.description: physical always-on screen showing LessonDraft metrics, school deadlines, weather. ~$50-80 for Pi + screen.

ideas.name: AI voice assistant on a speaker
ideas.description: custom voice assistant connected to your own systems/data. Needs hardware.

ideas.name: Personal life API
ideas.description: one unified API layer over Git, Stripe, Gmail, school system, calendar. Query anything about your digital life from anywhere. Foundation layer that everything else plugs into.
